title: [FIRRTL] GCT Mem Taps + Dedup Producing Invalid XMRs

features.name: xmr to memory array element via module hierarchy
features.description: Code should include an XMR accessing a memory array element through an instantiated module hierarchy, where the memory is defined in a sub-module and accessed via hierarchical path

features.name: incorrect xmr path prefix in generated code
features.description: Code should include an XMR with incorrect hierarchical path prefix that references a higher-level module instead of the correct intermediate module in the instantiation chain
